_comment: Hand-derived, same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Weight is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `weight.mass`. WP-07's own plan text flags the unit as unconfirmed ('Google field is grams or kg -- verify against a real payload and pin in a fixture'); this fixture assumes kilograms (70.5) and does not apply any WP-05 UnitNormalizer conversion -- that confirmation/conversion is explicitly left to WP-07 (SyncKit's TypeMapper), not this package. WP-05 only needs this fixture to prove GoogleDataPoint decodes id/start/end/source/values correctly for a Sample type.
